graphql.query:
mutation CreatePropertyWithImages($input: CreatePropertyWithImagesInput!) {
    createPropertyWithImages(input: $input) {
        success
        message
        data {
            id
            userId
            title
            zipCode
            propertyType
            address
            agentId
            amenities
            approvalStatus
            approvedAt
            approvedBy
            bathrooms
            bedrooms
            city
            country
            createdAt
            description
            isFeatured
            lotSize
            price
            squareFeet
            state
            status
            updatedAt
            viewsCount
            visitsCount
            yearBuilt
            firstName
            lastName
            email
            phoneNumber
            district
            category
            condition
            seoOptimized
            totalFloors
            parkingSpots
            floorNumber
            transactionType
            images {
                url
                label
            }
            latitude
            longitude
        }
    }
}

graphql.query:
query ListAllProperties(
    $limit: Int
    $page: Int
    $latitude: Float
    $longitude: Float
    $radiusKm: Float
    $status: PropertyStatus
    $statuses: [PropertyStatus!]
    $propertyType: PropertyType
    $propertyTypes: [PropertyType!]
    $searchQuery: String
    $userId: ID
    $minPrice: Float
    $maxPrice: Float
    $minBedrooms: Int
    $maxBedrooms: Int
    $minBathrooms: Int
    $maxBathrooms: Int
    $bedrooms: Int
    $bathrooms: Int
    $sortBy: String
    $transactionType: TransactionType
    $approvalStatus: ApprovalStatus
    $visibility: String
    $location: String
    $listingType: String
    $isFavorite: Boolean
    $includeNearbyZipCodes: Boolean
    $zipCode: String
) {
    listPropertiesWithImages(
        limit: $limit
        page: $page
        status: $status
        latitude: $latitude
        longitude: $longitude
        radiusKm: $radiusKm
        userId: $userId
        statuses: $statuses
        isFavorite: $isFavorite
        visibility: $visibility
        propertyType: $propertyType
        propertyTypes: $propertyTypes
        searchQuery: $searchQuery
        bedrooms: $bedrooms
        bathrooms: $bathrooms
        minPrice: $minPrice
        maxPrice: $maxPrice
        minBedrooms: $minBedrooms
        maxBedrooms: $maxBedrooms
        minBathrooms: $minBathrooms
        maxBathrooms: $maxBathrooms
        transactionType: $transactionType
        approvalStatus: $approvalStatus
        sortBy: $sortBy
        location: $location
        listingType: $listingType
        zipCode: $zipCode
        includeNearbyZipCodes: $includeNearbyZipCodes
    ) {
        success
        count
        nextToken
        approvedCount
        pendingCount
        data {
            id
            userId
            agentId
            title
            description
            approvalStatus
            address
            city
            zipCode
            propertyType
            price
            bedrooms
            bathrooms
            status
            viewsCount
            createdAt
            updatedAt
            approvedAt
            approvedBy
            seoOptimized
            country
            isFavorite
            transactionType
            latitude
            longitude
            images {
                url
                label
            }
        }
        pagination {
            current_page
            has_next_page
            has_prev_page
            limit
            total_count
            total_pages
        }
    }
}

response.name: Positive - Successful Property Listing

graphql.query:
query listPropertiesWithImages($limit: Int, $page: Int, $userId: ID, $statuses: [String]) {
  listPropertiesWithImages(limit: $limit, page: $page, userId: $userId, statuses: $statuses) {
    success
    count
    nextToken
    approvedCount
    pendingCount
    data {
      id
      userId
      agentId
      title
      description
      approvalStatus
      address
      city
      zipCode
      propertyType
      price
      bedrooms
      bathrooms
      status
      viewsCount
      createdAt
      updatedAt
      approvedAt
      approvedBy
      seoOptimized
      country
      isFavorite
      transactionType
      latitude
      longitude
      images {
        url
        label
      }
    }
    pagination {
      current_page
      has_next_page
      has_prev_page
      limit
      total_count
      total_pages
    }
  }
}
